# AG9-A: Expected QEMU boot sequence fragments
#
# Each non-comment line is a substring that must appear in the QEMU boot log
# for the corresponding check to pass. Lines are checked in order.
#
# Format: CHECK_NAME | expected_fragment
#
# These fragments are validated when the full kernel binary is linked and
# runs on QEMU. During pre-hardware development, checks are informational.

BOOT_BANNER | seLe4n
UART_INIT   | UART
MMU_INIT    | MMU
GIC_INIT    | GIC
TIMER_INIT  | Timer
BOOT_DONE   | Boot complete
